positive: A minimalist, abstract geometric forest of glowing bioluminescent mushrooms and root structures, forming an intricate maze. The design features clean, contrasting silhouettes of plant life against a dark midnight blue and teal background. Use strong, glowing neon accents of electric purple and lime green to define the shapes, giving a vaporwave yet natural feel. The composition must be perfectly centered and scalable, designed specifically for apparel printing, resembling high-contrast negative space artwork. Studio lighting, ultra detailed, perfect for screen printing.
negative: blur, artifacts, watermark, text, signature, logo, low detail, dirty, messy, extra limbs, bad anatomy, noise, grainy, poorly rendered, jpeg artifacts, cartoonish, photographic, abstract (unless it is the geometric structure itself)
